---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! I’m **Aysenaz Ozyer**, an Industrial Engineering student at **Hacettepe University**.

This website is a personal space where I share my work for the **EMU430 course**, including assignments, data analysis, and projects related to analytics and data science.

Through this site, I aim to document my learning process and present the analytical tools and methods I explore during the course.
